mapper.sql: wf_process_instance_step.id, wf_process_instance_step.step_id AS stepId, wf_process_instance_step.instance_id AS instanceId, wf_process_instance_step.entity_id AS entityId, wf_process_instance_step.row_id AS rowId, wf_process_instance_step.virtual_form_code AS virtualFormCode
mapper.select: SELECT wf_process_instance_step.* FROM wf_process_instance_step WHERE wf_process_instance_step.id=#{id} GROUP BY wf_process_instance_step.id

SELECT
FROM wf_process_instance_step
WHERE 1=1
AND wf_process_instance_step.id LIKE CONCAT('%',#{record.id},'%')
AND wf_process_instance_step.step_id LIKE CONCAT('%',#{record.stepId},'%')
AND wf_process_instance_step.instance_id LIKE CONCAT('%',#{record.instanceId},'%')
AND wf_process_instance_step.entity_id LIKE CONCAT('%',#{record.entityId},'%')
AND wf_process_instance_step.row_id LIKE CONCAT('%',#{record.rowId},'%')
AND wf_process_instance_step.virtual_form_code LIKE CONCAT('%',#{record.virtualFormCode},'%')
AND wf_process_instance_step.start_time >= DATE(#{startTime})
AND wf_process_instance_step.end_time <= DATE(#{endTime}

SELECT wf_process_instance_step.*,t_virtual_form.design_data as designData FROM wf_process_instance_step LEFT JOIN wf_process_step ON wf_process_instance_step.step_id = wf_process_step.id left join wf_process_instance on wf_process_instance.id = wf_process_instance_step.instance_id left join t_virtual_form on t_virtual_form.`code` = wf_process_step.virtual_form_code where wf_process_instance.id = #{instanceId} and wf_process_step.type = 'start'

SELECT wf_process_instance_step.*,t_virtual_form.design_data as designData FROM wf_process_instance LEFT JOIN wf_process_step ON wf_process_instance.process_id = wf_process_step.process_id LEFT JOIN wf_process_instance_step ON wf_process_instance_step.instance_id = wf_process_instance.id left join t_virtual_form on t_virtual_form.`code` = wf_process_instance_step.virtual_form_code AND wf_process_instance_step.step_id = wf_process_step.id WHERE wf_process_instance.id = #{instanceId} AND wf_process_step.virtual_form_code = #{code} LIMIT 0,1

SELECT wf_process_instance_step.*,t_virtual_form.design_data as designData FROM wf_process_instance left join wf_process_instance_step on wf_process_instance.id = wf_process_instance_step.instance_id and wf_process_instance_step.step_id = wf_process_instance.current_step_id left join t_virtual_form on t_virtual_form.`code` = wf_process_instance_step.virtual_form_code where wf_process_instance.id = #{instanceId}
SELECT * FROM wf_process_instance_step WHERE wf_process_instance_step.step_id = #{stepId} and wf_process_instance_step.instance_id = #{instanceId}

SELECT instancStep.* FROM wf_process_instance instance left join wf_process process on process.id = instance.process_id left join wf_process_step step on step.process_id = process.id left join wf_process_instance_step instancStep on instancStep.step_id = step.id WHERE instancStep.instance_id = #{instanceId} and step.type = 'START' LIMIT 0,1
